text.title: Puppeteer Launch & Navigation Setup Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the puppeteer-launch-setup methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-environment
step.action: Identify env (local/docker/ci/serverless). Match flag set + cache-dir + chromium provider.

step.name: emit-launch-wrapper
step.action: Write src/launch.ts exporting launch() that applies the right args; default headless='new'.

step.name: emit-goto-helper
step.action: Write src/goto.ts exporting safeGoto(page, url) that uses domcontentloaded + targeted waitForSelector.

step.name: ensure-finally-close
step.action: Refactor each call site so browser.close lives in a finally block.

step.name: pin-chromium
step.action: Add packageManager + Puppeteer pinned version + (if serverless) @sparticuz/chromium pinned.
